Determination of catalase (CAT)
For the CAT quantity was followed previously published method via Ahmad et al.
for the calculation of activity of CAT [55]. Three milliliter mixture was taken which
contain 50 µL of 10%PMS, 950 µL 0.019 M  H2O2, 2 mL 0.1 M PBF contains 7.4
pH.  There  was  an  examination  performed  if  any  changes  take  place  at  240  nm
absorbance for CAT calculation in nmol of  H2O2 consumed  min−1  mg−1 protein as
use of 40/M/cm molar extinction coefficient.
Determination of protein
For the determination of protein was followed the Bradford method to examine the
quantity of protein [58] followed by Ahmad et al. [55] method that they have used
bovine serum albumin as a standard.
